title: Issue a new policy
situation: underwriter has approved a risk; policy documents must be generated, countersigned, delivered to broker/insured, and activated in the policy admin system
motivation: activate coverage and start premium billing without delay
outcome: policy issued, signed, delivered, and active in PAS
success_criteria: documents generated within 2 hours of bind order

title: Process mid-term policy endorsement
situation: insured requests a change to coverage, limits, or named insureds mid-term; change must be rated, priced, documented, and reflected in premium adjustment
motivation: keep coverage aligned with insured risk profile without requiring a new policy
outcome: endorsement issued, premium adjustment billed, PAS updated

title: Cancel or non-renew a policy
situation: underwriter or insured initiates cancellation or non-renewal; statutory notice periods, return-premium calculations, and mid-term audit for auditable lines must be managed
motivation: exit the risk cleanly while meeting all regulatory notice and refund obligations
outcome: cancellation notice sent, return premium calculated and issued, PAS closed

title: Conduct quarterly actuarial reserve review
situation: end-of-quarter close requires loss reserve adequacy certification; actuary pulls triangles, runs IBNR models, documents assumptions, and signs off for CFO and external auditors
motivation: ensure reserves are adequate and opinion can be certified to regulators and auditors
outcome: signed reserve opinion filed; management and board summary delivered
success_criteria: triangles pulled within 3 days of quarter end
reserve opinion signed within 10 business days

title: Manage producer/broker appointment
situation: new broker or MGA must be appointed: licensing verified in all target states, E&O certificate collected, appointment filed with DOI, contracting executed
motivation: onboard new distribution partner compliantly before they can bind business
outcome: broker active in distribution system; state appointments filed
success_criteria: license verified in all target states

title: Handle salvage and recovery
situation: after a total-loss claim settlement, insurer acquires salvage title and must sell the vehicle or asset to recoup value; title transfer, auction listing, and net recovery posting required
motivation: maximize recovery on total-loss settlements to reduce net loss cost
outcome: salvage sold, title transferred, net recovery posted to claim
success_criteria: title acquired within 10 days of settlement
salvage listed at auction within 5 business days
net recovery posted within 3 days of sale

title: Process CAT event response
situation: major catastrophe event generates volume spike of claims; CAT team must stand up field adjusters, triage by severity, track aggregate exposure vs reinsurance treaties, and report to executive team
motivation: respond quickly to policyholders while protecting balance sheet via treaty recovery
outcome: claims triaged and assigned, reinsurance notices sent, executive CAT report delivered
success_criteria: claims triaged by severity within 48 hours
reinsurance notice sent within treaty reporting window

title: File rate revision with state DOI
situation: annual rate review determines that premium rates need adjustment; actuarial support documentation, experience data, and rate manual must be filed with DOI in each state and approved before use
motivation: maintain rate adequacy while complying with regulatory approval requirements
outcome: rate filing submitted; approval or objection letter received and responded to
success_criteria: filing submitted with complete actuarial support
objection response filed within 30 days if applicable

title: Manage captive insurance program
situation: corporate risk manager administers a captive insurer: fronting arrangements, reinsurance panel, collateral posting, annual audit, and domicile-state filings all require coordinated workflow
motivation: optimize total cost of risk while maintaining captive compliance
outcome: captive program renewed; fronting and reinsurance contracts executed; audit filed
success_criteria: domicile annual report filed on time

title: Conduct SIU investigation
situation: claim flagged by fraud analytics requires formal SIU investigation: evidence gathering, recorded statements, social media review, ISO ClaimSearch query, potential referral to law enforcement or state fraud bureau
motivation: detect and deter insurance fraud; protect loss ratios
outcome: investigation closed with finding; regulatory referral filed if required
success_criteria: investigation opened within 5 days of referral
referral to state fraud bureau within 60 days if fraud confirmed

title: Place E&S market coverage
situation: risk declined by admitted market must be placed in E&S lines; wholesale broker must obtain declinations, select surplus lines carriers, file surplus lines tax, and deliver stamping-office evidence
motivation: secure coverage for hard-to-place risks while meeting surplus lines compliance requirements
outcome: E&S policy bound, surplus lines tax filed, stamping office evidence delivered
success_criteria: surplus lines tax filed within state deadline

title: Process life insurance death claim
situation: beneficiary submits death claim; examiner must verify coverage, review death certificate and APS if contestable period applies, calculate benefit, and issue payment or denial
motivation: pay valid claims promptly while applying contestability period scrutiny appropriately
outcome: claim paid or denied within statutory timeline; tax forms issued
success_criteria: payment issued within 30 days of complete proof

title: Issue Certificate of Insurance
situation: insured requests COI for a contract counterparty; account manager must verify coverage is in force, confirm additional-insured status if required, generate certificate, and obtain broker signature
motivation: provide evidence of coverage quickly so insured can meet contract requirements
outcome: COI issued and delivered to certificate holder within SLA
success_criteria: COI issued within 24 hours of request
additional insured endorsement confirmed if required

title: Settle treaty reinsurance bordereau
situation: quarterly bordereau due to treaty reinsurers; premium and loss data must be compiled from PAS, reconciled against treaty terms, bordereau generated, and cash settled
motivation: maintain accurate reinsurance accounting and preserve treaty relationships
outcome: bordereau submitted to all treaty reinsurers; cash settlement confirmed
success_criteria: data compiled within 5 days of quarter end
bordereau submitted on treaty due date

title: Handle workers compensation claim
situation: employee reports workplace injury; adjuster must triage, coordinate medical management, determine compensability, establish reserves, manage RTW program, and track statutory benefit payments
motivation: return employee to work quickly while controlling medical and indemnity costs
outcome: claim accepted or denied; medical management underway; RTW plan in place

title: Conduct annual premium audit
situation: auditable policy requires end-of-term audit to reconcile actual vs estimated exposure; auditor collects payroll/revenue records, recalculates premium, and issues audit bill or return
motivation: ensure premium accurately reflects actual exposure
outcome: audit completed; final premium billed or returned; PAS updated
success_criteria: audit scheduled within 30 days of policy expiry
bill or return issued within 15 days of audit

title: Manage cyber insurance incident response
situation: cyber policyholder reports a breach or ransomware event; insurer must invoke breach response panel, coordinate coverage under cyber policy, and manage expenses vs policy limits
motivation: minimize insured loss while coordinating covered response services efficiently
outcome: IR firm engaged; coverage determination made; expenses tracked against sublimits
success_criteria: IR firm engaged within 4 hours of notice

title: Process medical malpractice claim
situation: physician or hospital is sued for alleged malpractice; adjuster must engage defense counsel, evaluate damages, manage discovery, and pursue settlement or trial strategy
motivation: resolve the claim at the lowest defensible cost while protecting the insured license and reputation
outcome: claim resolved; defense costs and indemnity within reserve
success_criteria: claim resolved within statute of limitations

title: Conduct loss control survey
situation: underwriter requires on-site inspection of a commercial risk; consultant must schedule visit, complete hazard survey, score risk, prepare report, and upload recommendations to UW system
motivation: identify controllable hazards to reduce expected loss cost and support underwriting decision
outcome: survey report submitted; recommendations delivered to insured; UW system updated
success_criteria: survey scheduled within 10 days of request
visit completed before binding if required
report submitted within 5 business days of visit

title: Manage subrogation recovery litigation
situation: after settling a claim, insurer pursues subrogation recovery through litigation against the responsible third party; attorney must file suit, manage discovery, negotiate settlement, and remit recovery
motivation: recover claim dollars paid from the responsible party to reduce net loss cost
outcome: recovery amount received; recovery allocated to claim; attorney fees posted
success_criteria: suit filed within statute of limitations
recovery maximized relative to damages paid
recovery posted to claim file within 5 days of receipt
